title: manulea capensis
intro: Manulea capensis, also known as Cape manulea or wild iris, is a flowering plant native to South Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can be used to treat wounds, fever, and skin conditions. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce swelling, fight infection, and soothe digestive issues. Manulea capensis can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or infusion, and is often used in traditional medicine to support overall health and well-being.
